ddls:
CREATE TABLE "code_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code being analyzed */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language of the code */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., dead code, gas optimization) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL of the detailed report generated by the analysis */,
  "analysis_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the analysis in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_analysis_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("code_id") REFERENCES code ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the code */,
  "code_text" TEXT /* The code text */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language of the code */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Date the code was uploaded */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file containing the code */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path of the file on the server */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the code is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis that found the issue */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., dead code, gas optimization) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue (e.g., informational, critical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number where the issue is found */,
  "column_number" INTEGER /* Column number where the issue is found */,
  "suggested_fix" TEXT /* Suggested fix for the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES issue_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES code_analysis ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_severity FOREIGN KEY ("severity") REFERENCES severity_levels ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the issue type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "severity_levels" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the comment has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("code_id") REFERENCES code ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user collaborating */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("code_id") REFERENCES code ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_versions_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("code_id") REFERENCES code ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
